name: MoneyGram
description_short: Portland, OR's MoneyGram at 4200 SE 82nd Ave offers check cashing and money transfer services.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 4200 SE 82nd Ave in Portland, OR serves the Southeast side of the city as a standalone check-cashing destination. Open Monday through Saturday from 8 AM to 8 PM, and Sunday from 10 AM to 6 PM, this location is convenient for residents and workers in the area. The Southeast Portland location provides quick access to money transfer and check-cashing services without requiring a bank account.

This Portland MoneyGram branch specializes in domestic and international money transfers, check cashing, and bill payment services. To learn about current fees or to confirm service availability before your visit, call ahead at +1 503-788-0200. The location is staffed to handle both routine transactions and complex transfers with competitive rates.

If you're a Portland resident who needs check cashing or money transfer services, bring a valid photo ID and any checks or transfer details you plan to use. MoneyGram at this SE 82nd Ave location is ideal for unbanked or underbanked customers, as well as anyone seeking faster alternatives to traditional banking services. Hours are customer-friendly, with evening and weekend availability to fit most schedules.
pros: 17+ locations across Portland metro area providing extensive accessibility
Multiple CVS locations open until 10 PM for extended service hours
Partner locations include major chains (CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express) for convenience
Online and offline money transfer options for flexibility
Real-time location finder showing hours, addresses, and phone numbers
Services available at independent retailers like Stadium Superette for neighborhood access
Same-day transfer capability for urgent money movement needs
cons: Fees apply to money transfers and other services, which are not detailed on the location page
Service quality and speed dependent on individual partner retailer operations
Limited to transaction services only—does not offer credit building, loans, or financial management tools
Geographic inconsistency: one search result shows a Portland, TX location 1,733 miles away, suggesting poor location filtering
No clear information about transfer limits, delivery times, or exchange rates for international transfers
best_for: Customers needing same-day domestic money transfers to friends, family, or bill payments
International money senders who need physical locations for cash pickup or delivery
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who prefer in-person financial transactions
People seeking check-cashing services at convenient retail partner locations
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need reliable, accessible money transfer and check-cashing services at convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that this is a transaction service only—it provides no credit-building features, lending products, or emergency financial assistance, making it unsuitable for those seeking to improve credit scores or access emergency funds.
services: Offline in-person transfers at retail partner locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4200 SE 82nd Ave, Portland, OR. Check cashing and money transfers with extended hours.
